title: store: create_space_full bumps state tokens even when INSERT OR IGNORE is a no-op
description: daemon/src/store.rs:562-587 — create_space_full() unconditionally calls bump_state_seq('Space') and bump_state_seq('SpaceMember') after the transaction, regardless of whether either INSERT OR IGNORE actually inserted a row. If the space and creator-member already exist (e.g. called twice with the same id), both tokens increment falsely. Fix: inspect rows_affected of each INSERT OR IGNORE inside the transaction and only bump the corresponding token if > 0.
